import { createContext, useContext, useEffect, useState, ReactNode } from "react";
import type { SubmissionData, DocumentStatus, Document, DocumentHistoryEntry, DecisionStatus, WorkflowPhase, TimelineEvent, SessionEntry } from "@/data/mockData";
import { ensureWibTime, ensureWibTimestamp, formatTimestamp, formatTimelineNow } from "@/data/mockData";

export interface AdminSubmission extends SubmissionData {
  id: string;
}

const DOCUMENT_NAMES = [
  "Surat Permohonan Izin",
  "Salinan Izin Usaha",
  "Salinan Akreditasi",
  "Perjanjian Kerja Sama Luar Negeri",
  "Program Pemagangan",
  "Rencana Penempatan Pasca Pemagangan",
  "Profil LPK",
  "Draft Perjanjian Pemagangan",
];

const buildReviewDocuments = (status: DocumentStatus = "locked"): Document[] =>
  DOCUMENT_NAMES.map((name) => ({ name, status, history: [] }));

const SUBMISSION_STORAGE_KEY = "tracking-os-submissions";
const DEFAULT_OSS_STATUS = "Menunggu Verifikasi K/L";
const AUTH_USER_STORAGE_KEY = "tracking-os-auth-user";

const normalizeTrackingToken = (value: string): string =>
  value
    .normalize("NFKC")
    .toLowerCase()
    .replace(/[^a-z0-9]/g, "");

const TRACKING_RECEIPT_FORMAT = /^TRK-PB-(\d{4})-(\d{6})$/;

const buildTrackingReceipt = (year: number, sequence: number): string =>
  `TRK-PB-${year}-${String(sequence).padStart(6, "0")}`;

const generateTrackingReceipt = (existing: AdminSubmission[]): string => {
  const year = new Date().getFullYear();
  let maxSequence = 0;

  for (const submission of existing) {
    const match = submission.trackingReceipt.match(TRACKING_RECEIPT_FORMAT);
    if (!match) continue;
    const parsedYear = Number(match[1]);
    const parsedSeq = Number(match[2]);
    if (parsedYear !== year || Number.isNaN(parsedSeq)) continue;
    if (parsedSeq > maxSequence) maxSequence = parsedSeq;
  }

  return buildTrackingReceipt(year, maxSequence + 1);
};

const findSubmissionByTrackingReceipt = (list: AdminSubmission[], num: string): AdminSubmission | undefined => {
  const normalizedQuery = normalizeTrackingToken(num);
  if (!normalizedQuery) return undefined;
  return list.find((s) => normalizeTrackingToken(s.trackingReceipt) === normalizedQuery);
};

const findSubmissionBySubmissionNumber = (list: AdminSubmission[], num: string): AdminSubmission | undefined => {
  const normalizedQuery = normalizeTrackingToken(num);
  if (!normalizedQuery) return undefined;
  return list.find((s) => normalizeTrackingToken(s.submissionNumber) === normalizedQuery);
};

const getCurrentActor = (): string => {
  if (typeof window === "undefined") return "Admin";
  const raw = window.localStorage.getItem(AUTH_USER_STORAGE_KEY)?.trim();
  return raw || "Admin";
};

const parseLastUpdatedParts = (lastUpdated: string): { date: string; time: string } => {
  const [dateRaw, timeRaw] = lastUpdated.split(",");
  return {
    date: dateRaw?.trim() || "-",
    time: ensureWibTime(timeRaw?.trim() || "-"),
  };
};

const normalizeLegacyDocumentStatus = (value: string): DocumentStatus => {
  if (value === "approved") return "approved";
  if (value === "revision_required") return "revision_required";
  if (value === "under_review") return "locked";
  return "locked";
};

const buildInitialHistoryEntry = (
  status: DocumentStatus,
  note: string | undefined,
  lastUpdated: string,
): DocumentHistoryEntry | null => {
  if (status === "locked") return null;
  const parts = parseLastUpdatedParts(lastUpdated);
  return {
    date: parts.date,
    time: parts.time,
    status,
    note,
  };
};

const normalizeDocumentHistory = (doc: Document, lastUpdated: string): Document => {
  const safeStatus = normalizeLegacyDocumentStatus(String(doc.status));
  const safeNote = safeStatus === "revision_required" ? doc.note : undefined;

  if (Array.isArray(doc.history) && doc.history.length > 0) {
    const normalizedHistory = doc.history
      .map((entry) => ({
        ...entry,
        status: normalizeLegacyDocumentStatus(String(entry.status)),
        time: ensureWibTime(entry.time || "-"),
      }))
      .filter((entry) => entry.status !== "locked");

    return {
      ...doc,
      status: safeStatus,
      note: safeNote,
      history: normalizedHistory,
    };
  }
  const initialEntry = buildInitialHistoryEntry(safeStatus, safeNote, lastUpdated);
  return {
    ...doc,
    status: safeStatus,
    note: safeNote,
    history: initialEntry ? [initialEntry] : [],
  };
};

const appendHistoryIfChanged = (
  doc: Document,
  status: DocumentStatus,
  note: string | undefined,
  t: { date: string; time: string },
  forceAppend = false,
): Document => {
  const normalized = doc.history?.length ? doc : { ...doc, history: [] };
  const lastEntry = normalized.history[normalized.history.length - 1];
  const nextNote = note?.trim() || undefined;

  if (status === "locked") {
    return {
      ...normalized,
      status,
      note: undefined,
    };
  }

  if (!forceAppend && lastEntry && lastEntry.status === status && (lastEntry.note || "") === (nextNote || "")) {
    return {
      ...normalized,
      status,
      note: nextNote,
    };
  }

  return {
    ...normalized,
    status,
    note: nextNote,
    history: [
      ...normalized.history,
      {
        date: t.date,
        time: t.time,
        status,
        note: nextNote,
      },
    ],
  };
};

const inferVerificationCompleted = (submission: AdminSubmission): boolean => {
  if (typeof submission.verificationCompleted === "boolean") return submission.verificationCompleted;

  const hasPendingWorklist = Array.isArray(submission.verificationWorklistDocNumbers)
    && submission.verificationWorklistDocNumbers.length > 0;
  if (hasPendingWorklist) return false;

  const allDocsApproved = submission.documents.every(
    (doc) => normalizeLegacyDocumentStatus(String(doc.status)) === "approved",
  );
  if (!allDocsApproved) return false;

  const hasMovedBeyondVerification = (submission.timeline || []).some(
    (event) => event.phase === "PENINJAUAN" || event.phase === "PERSETUJUAN" || event.phase === "IZIN_TERBIT",
  );

  return hasMovedBeyondVerification || submission.reviewCompleted || submission.approvalCompleted || submission.licenseIssued;
};

const normalizeSubmissionDocuments = (submission: AdminSubmission): AdminSubmission => ({
  ...submission,
  lastUpdated: ensureWibTimestamp(submission.lastUpdated || "-"),
  skFileName: submission.skFileName?.trim() || "",
  skFileSizeBytes: Number.isFinite(submission.skFileSizeBytes) && submission.skFileSizeBytes > 0
    ? submission.skFileSizeBytes
    : 0,
  verificationCompleted: inferVerificationCompleted(submission),
  reviewCycle: Number.isInteger(submission.reviewCycle) && submission.reviewCycle > 0 ? submission.reviewCycle : 1,
  reviewDocuments: normalizeReviewDocuments(submission.reviewDocuments, submission.lastUpdated),
  verificationWorklistDocNumbers: normalizeWorklist(submission.verificationWorklistDocNumbers),
  lastRevisionCarryover: submission.lastRevisionCarryover && Array.isArray(submission.lastRevisionCarryover.worklistDocNumbers)
    ? {
      ...submission.lastRevisionCarryover,
      worklistDocNumbers: normalizeWorklist(submission.lastRevisionCarryover.worklistDocNumbers),
    }
    : undefined,
  timeline: submission.timeline.map((event) => ({
    ...event,
    actor: event.actor || "Admin",
    time: ensureWibTime(event.time || "-"),
  })),
  documents: submission.documents.map((doc) =>
    normalizeDocumentHistory(doc, submission.lastUpdated),
  ),
});

const normalizeReviewDocuments = (
  reviewDocuments: Document[] | undefined,
  lastUpdated: string,
): Document[] => {
  const fallback = buildReviewDocuments("locked");
  if (!Array.isArray(reviewDocuments) || reviewDocuments.length !== DOCUMENT_NAMES.length) {
    return fallback;
  }

  return reviewDocuments.map((doc, index) =>
    normalizeDocumentHistory(
      {
        ...doc,
        name: DOCUMENT_NAMES[index],
      },
      lastUpdated,
    ),
  );
};

const normalizeWorklist = (worklist: number[] | undefined): number[] => {
  if (!Array.isArray(worklist)) return [];
  return Array.from(new Set(worklist.filter((n) => Number.isInteger(n) && n >= 1 && n <= 8))).sort((a, b) => a - b);
};

const loadStoredSubmissions = (): AdminSubmission[] => {
  if (typeof window === "undefined") return initialSubmissions.map(normalizeSubmissionDocuments);
  const raw = window.localStorage.getItem(SUBMISSION_STORAGE_KEY);
  if (!raw) return initialSubmissions.map(normalizeSubmissionDocuments);

  try {
    const parsed = JSON.parse(raw) as AdminSubmission[];
    if (!Array.isArray(parsed) || parsed.length === 0) return initialSubmissions.map(normalizeSubmissionDocuments);
    const normalizedParsed = parsed.map((item) => ({
      ...item,
      kbli: item.kbli?.trim() || "85493",
      ossStatus: item.ossStatus?.trim() || DEFAULT_OSS_STATUS,
      lastUpdated: ensureWibTimestamp(item.lastUpdated || "-"),
      reviewCycle: Number.isInteger(item.reviewCycle) && item.reviewCycle > 0 ? item.reviewCycle : 1,
      skFileName: item.skFileName?.trim() || "",
      skFileSizeBytes: Number.isFinite(item.skFileSizeBytes) && item.skFileSizeBytes > 0
        ? item.skFileSizeBytes
        : 0,
      reviewDocuments: normalizeReviewDocuments(item.reviewDocuments, item.lastUpdated),
      verificationWorklistDocNumbers: normalizeWorklist(item.verificationWorklistDocNumbers),
      lastRevisionCarryover: item.lastRevisionCarryover && Array.isArray(item.lastRevisionCarryover.worklistDocNumbers)
        ? {
          ...item.lastRevisionCarryover,
          worklistDocNumbers: normalizeWorklist(item.lastRevisionCarryover.worklistDocNumbers),
        }
        : undefined,
      timeline: (item.timeline || []).map((event) => ({
        ...event,
        actor: event.actor || "Admin",
        time: ensureWibTime(event.time || "-"),
      })),
    }));

    const withTracking = normalizedParsed.map((item, index, arr) => {
      const receipt = item.trackingReceipt?.trim();
      const isValid = !!receipt && TRACKING_RECEIPT_FORMAT.test(receipt);
      return {
        ...item,
        trackingReceipt: isValid ? receipt : generateTrackingReceipt(arr.slice(0, index)),
      };
    });

    return withTracking.map(normalizeSubmissionDocuments);
  } catch {
    return initialSubmissions.map(normalizeSubmissionDocuments);
  }
};

export interface NewSubmissionInput {
  submissionNumber: string;
  organizationName: string;
  kbli: string;
  pengajuanDate: string;
}

export interface SessionDecisionInput {
  status: DecisionStatus;
  note?: string;
}

export interface ApprovalFinalizeInput {
  pbUmkuNumber: string;
  terbitDate: string;
  skFileName: string;
  skFileSizeBytes: number;
}

interface SubmissionContextType {
  submissions: AdminSubmission[];
  getSubmission: (id: string) => AdminSubmission | undefined;
  findBySubmissionNumber: (num: string) => AdminSubmission | undefined;
  findByTrackingReceipt: (num: string) => AdminSubmission | undefined;
  addSubmission: (input: NewSubmissionInput) => void;
  updatePengajuanData: (id: string, input: NewSubmissionInput) => void;
  deleteSubmission: (id: string) => void;
  confirmPengajuan: (id: string) => void;
  submitVerificationSession: (id: string, decisions: SessionDecisionInput[]) => void;
  submitReviewSession: (id: string, decisions: SessionDecisionInput[]) => void;
  finalizeApproval: (id: string, input: ApprovalFinalizeInput) => void;
}

const SubmissionContext = createContext<SubmissionContextType | null>(null);

export const useSubmissions = () => {
  const ctx = useContext(SubmissionContext);
  if (!ctx) throw new Error("useSubmissions must be used within SubmissionProvider");
  return ctx;
};

export const SubmissionProvider = ({ children }: { children: ReactNode }) => {
  const [submissions, setSubmissions] = useState<AdminSubmission[]>(loadStoredSubmissions);

  const mutate = (id: string, updater: (s: AdminSubmission) => AdminSubmission) => {
    setSubmissions((prev) => prev.map((s) => (s.id === id ? updater(s) : s)));
  };

  const getSubmission = (id: string) => submissions.find((s) => s.id === id);
  const findBySubmissionNumber = (num: string) => {
    const fromState = findSubmissionBySubmissionNumber(submissions, num);
    if (fromState) return fromState;

    if (typeof window !== "undefined") {
      const fromStorage = findSubmissionBySubmissionNumber(loadStoredSubmissions(), num);
      if (fromStorage) return fromStorage;
    }

    return undefined;
  };

  const findByTrackingReceipt = (num: string) => {
    const fromState = findSubmissionByTrackingReceipt(submissions, num);
    if (fromState) return fromState;

    if (typeof window !== "undefined") {
      const fromStorage = findSubmissionByTrackingReceipt(loadStoredSubmissions(), num);
      if (fromStorage) return fromStorage;
    }

    return undefined;
  };

  const addSubmission = (input: NewSubmissionInput) => {
    const t = formatTimelineNow();
    const actor = getCurrentActor();
    const newId = String(Date.now());
    const newSubmission: AdminSubmission = {
      id: newId,
      submissionNumber: input.submissionNumber.trim(),
      trackingReceipt: generateTrackingReceipt(submissions),
      organizationName: input.organizationName.trim(),
      kbli: input.kbli.trim(),
      ossStatus: DEFAULT_OSS_STATUS,
      pengajuanDate: input.pengajuanDate,
      lastUpdated: formatTimestamp(),
      pengajuanConfirmed: false,
      verificationCompleted: false,
      documents: buildReviewDocuments("locked"),
      reviewNotes: "",
      reviewCompleted: false,
      approvalCompleted: false,
      approvalDate: "",
      licenseIssued: false,
      licenseNumber: "",
      licenseDate: "",
      skFileName: "",
      skFileSizeBytes: 0,
      reviewCycle: 1,
      reviewDocuments: buildReviewDocuments("locked"),
      verificationWorklistDocNumbers: [],
      timeline: [
        {
          date: t.date,
          time: t.time,
          actor,
          phase: "PENGAJUAN",
          description: "Pengajuan berhasil dibuat",
          type: "info" as const,
        },
      ],
    };
    setSubmissions((prev) => [newSubmission, ...prev]);
  };

  const updatePengajuanData = (id: string, input: NewSubmissionInput) => {
    mutate(id, (s) => {
      const cleanInput = {
        submissionNumber: input.submissionNumber.trim(),
        organizationName: input.organizationName.trim(),
        kbli: input.kbli.trim(),
        pengajuanDate: input.pengajuanDate.trim(),
      };

      const hasChanges = s.submissionNumber !== cleanInput.submissionNumber
        || s.organizationName !== cleanInput.organizationName
        || s.kbli !== cleanInput.kbli
        || s.pengajuanDate !== cleanInput.pengajuanDate;

      if (!hasChanges) return s;

      return {
        ...s,
        submissionNumber: cleanInput.submissionNumber,
        organizationName: cleanInput.organizationName,
        kbli: cleanInput.kbli,
        pengajuanDate: cleanInput.pengajuanDate,
        lastUpdated: formatTimestamp(),
      };
    });
  };

  const deleteSubmission = (id: string) => {
    setSubmissions((prev) => prev.filter((s) => s.id !== id));
  };

  const confirmPengajuan = (id: string) => {
    const t = formatTimelineNow();
    const actor = getCurrentActor();
    mutate(id, (s) => ({
      ...s,
      pengajuanConfirmed: true,
      verificationCompleted: false,
      lastUpdated: formatTimestamp(),
      timeline: [
        ...s.timeline,
        {
          date: t.date,
          time: t.time,
          actor,
          phase: "PENGAJUAN",
          description: "Pengajuan dikonfirmasi, verifikasi dokumen dimulai",
          type: "info" as const,
        },
      ],
    }));
  };

  const normalizeSessionDecisions = (
    decisions: SessionDecisionInput[],
    expectedLength: number,
  ): Array<{ status: DecisionStatus; note?: string }> | null => {
    if (!Array.isArray(decisions) || decisions.length !== expectedLength) {
      return null;
    }

    const normalized: Array<{ status: DecisionStatus; note?: string }> = [];
    for (const decision of decisions) {
      if (decision.status !== "approved" && decision.status !== "revision_required") {
        return null;
      }
      const cleanNote = decision.note?.trim();
      if (decision.status === "revision_required" && !cleanNote) {
        return null;
      }
      normalized.push({
        status: decision.status,
        note: cleanNote || undefined,
      });
    }
    return normalized;
  };

  const getNextSessionNumber = (timeline: TimelineEvent[], phase: WorkflowPhase): number => {
    const maxSession = timeline.reduce((max, event) => {
      if (event.phase !== phase) return max;
      const session = event.sessionNumber || event.reviewCycle || 1;
      return Math.max(max, session);
    }, 0);
    return maxSession + 1;
  };

  const createSessionDecisionEvents = (
    phase: "VERIFIKASI" | "PENINJAUAN",
    sessionNumber: number,
    decisions: Array<{ status: DecisionStatus; note?: string }>,
    docs: Document[],
    t: { date: string; time: string },
    actor: string,
  ): TimelineEvent[] =>
    decisions.map((decision, index) => ({
      date: t.date,
      time: t.time,
      actor,
      phase,
      sessionNumber,
      documentNumber: index + 1,
      decisionStatus: decision.status,
      note: decision.note,
      description: decision.status === "approved"
        ? `${docs[index].name} dinyatakan sesuai persyaratan`
        : `${docs[index].name} memerlukan perbaikan${decision.note ? `: ${decision.note}` : ""}`,
      type: decision.status === "approved" ? "success" : "error",
    }));

  const createSessionSnapshotEntries = (
    decisions: Array<{ status: DecisionStatus; note?: string }>,
    docs: Document[],
    t: { date: string; time: string },
  ): SessionEntry[] =>
    decisions.map((decision, index) => ({
      documentNumber: index + 1,
      documentName: docs[index].name,
      status: decision.status,
      note: decision.note,
      date: t.date,
      time: t.time,
    }));

  const getRevisionDocNumbers = (docs: Document[]): number[] =>
    docs
      .map((doc, index) => ({ doc, docNumber: index + 1 }))
      .filter(({ doc }) => normalizeLegacyDocumentStatus(String(doc.status)) === "revision_required")
      .map(({ docNumber }) => docNumber);

  const getEditableDocNumbers = (docs: Document[]): number[] => {
    const revisionDocNumbers = getRevisionDocNumbers(docs);
    if (revisionDocNumbers.length === 0) {
      return docs.map((_, index) => index + 1);
    }
    return revisionDocNumbers;
  };

  const submitVerificationSession = (id: string, decisions: SessionDecisionInput[]) => {
    const t = formatTimelineNow();
    const actor = getCurrentActor();
    mutate(id, (s) => {
      if (!s.pengajuanConfirmed || s.verificationCompleted) return s;
      const normalized = normalizeSessionDecisions(decisions, s.documents.length);
      if (!normalized) return s;

      const editableDocNumbers = getEditableDocNumbers(s.documents);
      const editableSet = new Set(editableDocNumbers);

      const effectiveDecisions = normalized.map((decision, index) => {
        const docNumber = index + 1;
        if (editableSet.has(docNumber)) return decision;

        const lockedStatus = normalizeLegacyDocumentStatus(String(s.documents[index].status));
        return {
          status: lockedStatus === "revision_required" ? "revision_required" : "approved",
          note: s.documents[index].note?.trim() || undefined,
        };
      });

      const nextDocuments = s.documents.map((doc, index) =>
        appendHistoryIfChanged(
          doc,
          effectiveDecisions[index].status,
          effectiveDecisions[index].note,
          t,
          editableSet.has(index + 1),
        ),
      );
      const hasRevision = effectiveDecisions.some((decision) => decision.status === "revision_required");
      const nextRevisionDocNumbers = effectiveDecisions
        .map((decision, index) => ({ decision, docNumber: index + 1 }))
        .filter(({ decision }) => decision.status === "revision_required")
        .map(({ docNumber }) => docNumber);
      const sessionNumber = getNextSessionNumber(s.timeline, "VERIFIKASI");

      const decisionEvents = createSessionDecisionEvents(
        "VERIFIKASI",
        sessionNumber,
        effectiveDecisions,
        nextDocuments,
        t,
        actor,
      );
      const snapshotEntries = createSessionSnapshotEntries(effectiveDecisions, nextDocuments, t);

      const movesToNextPhase = !hasRevision;

      return {
        ...s,
        documents: nextDocuments,
        verificationCompleted: movesToNextPhase,
        reviewCompleted: false,
        approvalCompleted: false,
        approvalDate: "",
        verificationWorklistDocNumbers: hasRevision ? nextRevisionDocNumbers : [],
        lastRevisionCarryover: undefined,
        lastUpdated: formatTimestamp(),
        timeline: [
          ...s.timeline,
          ...decisionEvents,
          {
            date: t.date,
            time: t.time,
            actor,
            phase: "VERIFIKASI",
            sessionNumber,
            sessionEntries: snapshotEntries,
            description: hasRevision
              ? `Sesi verifikasi #${sessionNumber} disimpan. Terdapat dokumen yang memerlukan perbaikan, tahapan tetap pada Verifikasi Dokumen.`
              : `Sesi verifikasi #${sessionNumber} disimpan. Seluruh dokumen sesuai persyaratan, proses dilanjutkan ke Peninjauan Dokumen.`,
            type: hasRevision ? "warning" : "success",
          },
        ],
      };
    });
  };

  const submitReviewSession = (id: string, decisions: SessionDecisionInput[]) => {
    const t = formatTimelineNow();
    const actor = getCurrentActor();
    mutate(id, (s) => {
      if (!s.verificationCompleted || s.reviewCompleted) return s;
      const normalized = normalizeSessionDecisions(decisions, s.reviewDocuments.length);
      if (!normalized) return s;

      const editableDocNumbers = getEditableDocNumbers(s.reviewDocuments);
      const editableSet = new Set(editableDocNumbers);

      const effectiveDecisions = normalized.map((decision, index) => {
        const docNumber = index + 1;
        if (editableSet.has(docNumber)) return decision;

        const lockedStatus = normalizeLegacyDocumentStatus(String(s.reviewDocuments[index].status));
        return {
          status: lockedStatus === "revision_required" ? "revision_required" : "approved",
          note: s.reviewDocuments[index].note?.trim() || undefined,
        };
      });

      const nextReviewDocuments = s.reviewDocuments.map((doc, index) =>
        appendHistoryIfChanged(
          doc,
          effectiveDecisions[index].status,
          effectiveDecisions[index].note,
          t,
          editableSet.has(index + 1),
        ),
      );
      const hasRevision = effectiveDecisions.some((decision) => decision.status === "revision_required");
      const sessionNumber = getNextSessionNumber(s.timeline, "PENINJAUAN");
      const revisionDocNumbers = effectiveDecisions
        .map((decision, index) => ({ decision, docNumber: index + 1 }))
        .filter(({ decision }) => decision.status === "revision_required")
        .map(({ docNumber }) => docNumber);

      const decisionEvents = createSessionDecisionEvents(
        "PENINJAUAN",
        sessionNumber,
        effectiveDecisions,
        nextReviewDocuments,
        t,
        actor,
      );
      const snapshotEntries = createSessionSnapshotEntries(effectiveDecisions, nextReviewDocuments, t);

      const movesToNextPhase = !hasRevision;

      return {
        ...s,
        reviewDocuments: nextReviewDocuments,
        reviewCompleted: movesToNextPhase,
        reviewNotes: hasRevision
          ? `Masih terdapat dokumen yang memerlukan perbaikan: ${revisionDocNumbers.join(", ")}.`
          : "Seluruh dokumen pada tahapan peninjauan dinyatakan sesuai persyaratan.",
        approvalCompleted: false,
        approvalDate: "",
        lastUpdated: formatTimestamp(),
        timeline: [
          ...s.timeline,
          ...decisionEvents,
          {
            date: t.date,
            time: t.time,
            actor,
            phase: "PENINJAUAN",
            sessionNumber,
            sessionEntries: snapshotEntries,
            description: hasRevision
              ? `Sesi peninjauan #${sessionNumber} disimpan. Terdapat dokumen yang memerlukan perbaikan, tahapan tetap pada Peninjauan Dokumen.`
              : `Sesi peninjauan #${sessionNumber} disimpan. Seluruh dokumen sesuai persyaratan, proses dilanjutkan ke Persetujuan Permohonan.`,
            type: hasRevision ? "warning" : "success",
          },
        ],
      };
    });
  };

  const finalizeApproval = (id: string, input: ApprovalFinalizeInput) => {
    const cleanNumber = input.pbUmkuNumber.trim();
    const cleanDate = input.terbitDate.trim();
    const cleanFileName = input.skFileName.trim();
    const cleanSize = Number.isFinite(input.skFileSizeBytes) && input.skFileSizeBytes > 0
      ? input.skFileSizeBytes
      : 0;

    if (!cleanNumber || !cleanDate) return;

    const t = formatTimelineNow();
    const actor = getCurrentActor();
    mutate(id, (s) => {
      if (!s.reviewCompleted || s.approvalCompleted) return s;
      return {
        ...s,
        ossStatus: "Izin Terbit",
        approvalCompleted: true,
        approvalDate: cleanDate,
        licenseIssued: true,
        licenseNumber: cleanNumber,
        licenseDate: cleanDate,
        skFileName: cleanFileName,
        skFileSizeBytes: cleanSize,
        lastUpdated: formatTimestamp(),
        timeline: [
          ...s.timeline,
          {
            date: t.date,
            time: t.time,
            actor,
            phase: "PERSETUJUAN",
            description: `Persetujuan disimpan. Nomor PB UMKU ${cleanNumber}, tanggal terbit ${cleanDate}.`,
            type: "success" as const,
          },
          {
            date: t.date,
            time: t.time,
            actor,
            phase: "IZIN_TERBIT",
            description: cleanFileName
              ? `Izin terbit: ${cleanNumber}. File SK: ${cleanFileName}`
              : `Izin terbit: ${cleanNumber}. File SK belum diunggah.`,
            type: "success" as const,
          },
        ],
      };
    });
  };

  useEffect(() => {
    if (typeof window === "undefined") return;
    window.localStorage.setItem(SUBMISSION_STORAGE_KEY, JSON.stringify(submissions));
  }, [submissions]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (typeof window === "undefined") return;
    const onStorage = (event: StorageEvent) => {
      if (event.key !== SUBMISSION_STORAGE_KEY) return;
      setSubmissions(loadStoredSubmissions());
    };
    window.addEventListener("storage", onStorage);
    return () => window.removeEventListener("storage", onStorage);
  }, []);

  return (
    <SubmissionContext.Provider value={{
      submissions,
      getSubmission,
      findBySubmissionNumber,
      findByTrackingReceipt,
      addSubmission,
      updatePengajuanData,
      deleteSubmission,
      confirmPengajuan,
      submitVerificationSession,
      submitReviewSession,
      finalizeApproval,
    }}>
      {children}
    </SubmissionContext.Provider>
  );
};

messages.message: Parsing error: JSX element 'main' has no corresponding closing tag.
React Hook useEffect has a missing dependency: 'confirmPengajuan'. Either include it or remove the dependency array.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [confirmPengajuan]
